rejected_candidates.name: standalone neural models
rejected_candidates.reason: did not beat deterministic baseline on validation mean and regressed low-risk bulk

rejected_candidates.name: gated GRU hybrid
rejected_candidates.reason: tiny mean/p95 gain with p99 regression and nontrivial regression count

rejected_candidates.name: piecewise gain tables and conservative gates
rejected_candidates.reason: mean gains were below material threshold and tail/regression behavior was not compelling

implementation_recommendation.fallback_policy: hold current or existing exact/current behavior when DWM horizon is unavailable or invalid
